code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AppContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();export const AppProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[isAdmin,setIsAdmin]=useState(()=>{return sessionStorage.getItem('isAdmin')==='true';});const[selectedUser,setSelectedUser]=useState(()=>{const saved=sessionStorage.getItem('selectedUser');return saved?JSON.parse(saved):null;});const loginAdmin=()=>{setIsAdmin(true);sessionStorage.setItem('isAdmin','true');};const logoutAdmin=()=>{setIsAdmin(false);sessionStorage.removeItem('isAdmin');};const loginUser=user=>{setSelectedUser(user);sessionStorage.setItem('selectedUser',JSON.stringify(user));};const logoutUser=()=>{setSelectedUser(null);sessionStorage.removeItem('selectedUser');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppContext.Provider,{value:{isAdmin,loginAdmin,logoutAdmin,selectedUser,loginUser,logoutUser},children:children});};export const useApp=()=>useContext(AppContext);
